text: Healthy living is about more than just eating your vegetables. It involves a balanced diet with plenty of fruits, vegetables, and whole grains, but also managing your time well. Regular exercise, such as walking or cycling for 30 minutes a day, keeps your body strong. Equally important is getting enough sleep, around seven to nine hours each night, to restore your energy. Mental health matters too—practicing mindfulness or talking to friends can reduce stress. Finally, aim for a good work-life balance by taking breaks and pursuing hobbies. Together, these habits create a healthier, happier life.
